scope: Repository-local structural boundary and deterministic fixture schema. It is not a production wire schema, Privacy Pass token type, algorithm selection, IANA allocation, or authorization implementation.

fixture_canonicalization.encoding: UTF-8 JSON with object keys sorted lexicographically, no insignificant whitespace, and only the string, integer, boolean, null, array, and object values admitted by this registry
fixture_canonicalization.purpose: deterministic repository-owned negative-control fixtures only; not a protocol encoding
fixture_canonicalization.message_version: JSON integer 1 exactly; booleans and all other JSON types are rejected
fixture_canonicalization.challenge_digest: lowercase SHA-256 hex of the canonical challenge fixture object under this fixture encoding only; not a production protocol digest

construction_dependencies: reviewed post-quantum blindness and one-more-unforgeability model
canonical production request, response, token, configuration, and error encodings
maintained constant-time implementation and deterministic cryptographic vectors
Privacy Pass and CFRG review of the token type and classical-plus-PQ AND composition
independent cryptographic, privacy, and implementation review
